channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 'This campaign works because it feels ordinary': Experts reveal how hackers use fake DHL messages to lure in victims
item.description: Forcepoint uncovers new phishing campaign using DHL assets, and even found where the passwords are being sent to.

item.title: Ubuntu’s AI plans have Linux users looking for a ‘kill switch’
item.description: Canonical's plan to add AI features to Ubuntu has some users asking for "a version of Ubuntu that does not include these features," while others say they'll stick with older versions of the Linux distro or even switch to a different one. After Canonical's announcement earlier this week that it's bringing AI features to Ubuntu, […]

item.title: Sanctioned Chinese AI Firm SenseTime Releases Image Model Built for Speed
item.description: With US restrictions limiting its access to advanced tech, SenseTime is doubling down on open source with a new model optimized to run on Chinese-made chips.

item.title: Je suis monté à bord de la Volkswagen ID. Polo, et je pense que la R5 électrique a trouvé un adversaire à sa taille
item.description: Nous avons pu monter à bord de la Volkswagen ID. Polo, la nouvelle voiture électrique de la marque – et, accessoirement, rivale notable de la Renault 5 E-Tech. Les promesses sont alléchantes, mais qu'en est-il en réalité ? Voici nos premières impressions.

item.title: Google Photos uses AI to make the iconic closet from ‘Clueless’ a reality
item.description: Google recreates Cher's closet from "Clueless" with AI.

item.title: More Gemini features are coming to Google TV
item.description: Google TV just got more Gemini features, including the ability to transform photos and videos with tools Nano Banana and Veo.

item.title: 'I won’t provide instructions, tactics, or advice that could help someone commit a crime': ChatGPT claims it won't assist would-be felons, despite claims to the contrary from Florida AG
item.description: ChatGPT is being looked at by Florida's Attorney General as a co-conspirator in a crime, but is that even possible? ChatGPT says it's not

item.title: GTA 6 desperately needs this one feature to give PC players a boost — and I can't believe I'm saying this, but it should take a gamer-friendly page from Ubisoft's book
item.description: GTA 6 is now only a few months away, and there's one thing Rockstar Games must do if it wants to fully capitalize on game sales.

item.title: Does a home theater speaker need to be beautiful? Scottish hi-fi great Fyne Audio is banking on 'reference-level' sound with a high SPL being enough for its new line-up — they more for hiding in the wall than displaying proudly, and that's okay
item.description: Fyne Audio's new monitors and sub deliver very high SPL in a design made to "visually disappear"

item.title: I’ve been using bird feeder cameras for years, and new avian health warnings had me worried for the summer months — but this smart bird bath alternative, along with expert advice, will let me get my garden bird-watching fix responsibly
item.description: I’ve been using a bird feeder camera for years and new disease warnings had me worried for warmer months — but this smart bird bath alternative and RSPB advice will give me my garden birdlife-watching fix, responsibly

item.title: I went hands-on with the Motorola Razr Fold, and it feels like Moto's excellent flip phone formula finally scaled up
item.description: Motorola’s Razr Fold feels like the company’s most serious foldable yet, pairing thin premium hardware, a large 6,000mAh battery, and flagship specs with a clear goal of challenging Samsung and Google — but the quality of its cameras and software will determine whether it can truly compete.

item.title: Ghirardelli Chocolate products recalled over Salmonella fears. Avoid this list of 13 beverage mixes
item.description: The storied California-based company says it is recalling the products after a dairy producer linked its milk powder to potential contamination. California-based Ghirardelli Chocolate Company has voluntarily recalled 13 of its powdered beverage mixes over concerns of potential Salmonella contamination.

item.title: Bill Gurley, Jack Altman back startup Pursuit, which helps companies sell to government
item.description: On Wednesday, Pursuit announced a $22 million seed round led by Mike Rosengarten, the co-founder of OpenGov with out big-name VCs participating.

item.title: 'The first releases will begin very, very soon': How to access UFO and alien files anonymously as President Trump hints at 'tremendous interest' in the soon-to-be-released and previously classified US records on extraterrestrial life
item.description: President Trump has suggested there's 'tremendous interest' in the soon-to-be-released alien files. So how can you access them? And, more, importantly, how can you access them without leaving your data open to prying eyes?

item.title: Letting OpenAI win risks 'losing every charity in America' Elon Musk says in court, as his lawsuit hearing begins
item.description: Elon Musk is taking on OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, and has had some choice words to say on the opening day.

item.title: The hidden logic behind AI CEOs’ job loss warnings
item.description: Dire warnings from AI leaders may sound like transparency, but they also reinforce the investor and corporate narrative driving the race to build an AI-powered economy. Why do CEOs of big AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic often publicly acknowledge that AI is likely to result in significant job loss? Most AI company CEOs now concede that widespread job loss from AI is coming, while differing somewhat on the timeline....

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2, Google TV Streamer 4K, PS5 Slim : les meilleures offres high-tech de la journée – meilleurs bons plans
item.description: Les French Days 2026 continuent de livrer leur lot de bonnes affaires et en voici un petit extrait.

item.title: Google Photos devient une cabine d’essayage (oui oui, vous avez bien lu)
item.description: Une nouvelle fonction Google Photos détecte intelligemment les tenues dans les images et permet de combiner différents styles comme si vous étiez dans un dressing virtuel.

item.title: Voici les Motorola Moto G37, G37 Power, G47 et G87 : quatre smartphones, quatre fois plus de plaisir
item.description: Ça bouge chez Motorola. Une flopée de smartphones vient rejoindre le catalogue de la marque. Intéressons-nous à la gamme G avec 4 nouveaux modèles.

item.title: De 229 € à 1499 € : Motorola lance 8 nouveaux smartphones pour tous les budgets
item.description: Motorola présente aujourd’hui pas moins de huit nouveaux modèles de smartphones, dont trois nouveaux issus d’une nouvelle série Razr et quatre issus du renouvellement de sa gamme g.

item.title: Motorola’s New Razr Folding Phones Command a Higher Price With Few Upgrades
item.description: Say hello (Moto) to price hikes on all three of Motorola’s latest Razr flip phones.

item.title: Motorola just revealed the Razr Fold’s price and hoo boy
item.description: 2026 is shaping up to be a tough year to launch a high-end phone. The memory crisis has phone prices rising across the board, so an already expensive phone risks becoming a much too expensive phone. That might be what happened to the Razr Fold, which will cost $1,900 when it goes on sale in […]

item.title: The new Razr Ultra is still the best-looking phone out there
item.description: Look, you're not going to find much new on the 2026 version of the Motorola Razr Ultra. There's a new main camera sensor, a slightly bigger battery, and a higher price: $1,499, up from $1,299. But one thing hasn't changed: this is a darn good looking phone. The wood-finish back panel returns, and is joined […]

item.title: The Moto Razr and Razr Plus are victims of shrinkflation
item.description: The memory crisis claims another couple of victims. Motorola's midtier and entry-level flip phones cost $100 more than their predecessors, and have few upgrades to show for it. The 2026 Razr Plus costs $1,099, up from $999. It still comes with a Snapdragon 8S Gen 3 chipset - two years old at this point - […]

item.title: Google Photos launches an AI try-on feature for clothes you already have
item.description: Google Photos is launching a new AI-powered feature you can use to virtually try on clothes you already have. Using the photos in your gallery, Google will create a virtual "wardrobe," allowing you to mix and match outfits, save the looks you like, and share them with friends. A video shared by Google shows how […]

item.title: How to watch Atletico Madrid vs Arsenal: Free Streams for Champions League 2025/26 Semi-Final 1st leg
item.description: All the ways to watch Atletico Madrid vs Arsenal live streams from anywhere and for free, as Spain meets England for a place in the 2026 Champions League final.

item.title: I tried Motorola’s Razr Ultra 2026, and it makes every other flip phone feel boring by comparison
item.description: The Razr Ultra 2026 keeps the same winning flip-phone formula as its predecessors, but upgrades like a bigger battery, faster charging, and smarter AI features help it stay ahead — even if the higher price is harder to ignore.

item.title: Motorola just dropped 5 new products, including the Samsung Galaxy-rivaling Razr Ultra 2026 series and Razr Fold
item.description: Motorola has announced the Razr 2026, the Razr Plus 2026, and the Razr Ultra 2026, along with US availability for the Razr Fold and the Moto Buds 2 Plus.

item.title: Motorola lance un nouveau smartphone en bois à 800 euros
item.description: Motorola vient de lever le voile sur son nouveau fleuron, le motorola Edge 70 Pro qui mise sur des matériaux atypiques comme le bois ou l'acétate pour se démarquer.

item.title: Razr 70, Plus et Ultra : Motorola fait flamber les prix des smartphones pliables
item.description: Motorola vient de dévoiler sa nouvelle génération de smartphones pliables pour 2026. Avec les Razr 70, Razr 70 Plus et Razr 70 Ultra, la marque américaine décline son concept en trois segments, allant de 999 à 1499 euros.

item.title: Bouygues Telecom : attention à cette autre nouvelle hausse de prix surprise
item.description: Décidément, Bouygues Telecom a visiblement besoin de rentrées d'argent supplémentaires. L'opérateur procède à une autre hausse de prix discrète et heureusement refusable.

item.title: Quelle souris Bluetooth bureautique choisir pour votre PC en 2026 ?
item.description: Qu'elle accompagne un PC portable, un PC fixe ou une tablette, la souris sans fil est devenue l'accessoire indispensable de notre quotidien numérique. Ergonomie, autonomie et précision : découvrez notre sélection des meilleurs modèles Bluetooth, quel que soit votre budget.

item.title: French Days 2026 : les meilleures offres Tech en DIRECT de cette première journée de promotions
item.description: C'est le top départ des French Days sur Boulanger, Fnac, Darty, Cdiscount et bien d'autres. Même Amazon s'y met avec sa French Week ! Dans tous les cas, comptez sur nous pour vous partager dans cet article, qui sera régulièrement mis à jour, les meilleures offres sur les produits Tech populaires en 2026.

item.title: Microsoft is giving its Xbox employees an Xbox email address
item.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma wants everyone to know: "We are Xbox." Just last week, she scrapped Microsoft Gaming as the name of Microsoft's gaming division in favor of simply Xbox. Now, to reinforce that message, sources at Xbox tell me that all Xbox employees are getting an @xbox.com email address next month. The new Xbox […]
